case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CASIMIRO, GRACE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CASIMIRO, GRACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASIMIRO, GRACE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASIMIRO, GRACE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.87, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO GRACE CASIMIRO, RETURNED TO COURT, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CASIMIRO, GRACE NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
